programme.title: S3E4 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go further behind the scenes as the crew captures Tokyo’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture reigns supreme. They search for the elusive Shinichi Moroboshi, a legendary figure in Japan’s supercar scene and well-known Lamborghini enthusiast. The adventure continues in the snow with GoPro athletes John Jackson and Chris Benchetler on a quest for the perfect ride. From the bustling streets of Tokyo to the serene landscapes of Hakuba and the untouched powder fields of Hokkaido, the crew follows every moment of their journey. Along the way, you will see how these breathtaking stories were crafted, from scouting locations to capturing the raw energy and beauty of each scene. This is your all-access pass to the artistry, adrenaline, and dedication that make these adventures unforgettable.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S2E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you to the world’s most extreme mountain biking adventures. Watch Geoff Gulevich, trail master, tackle some of the gnarliest chutes in Williams Lake, BC, dropping in with local legend Cory Brunelle, downhill expert. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.

programme.title: S3E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic, boundary-pushing adventures. Watch GoPro athlete Kilian Bron, trail innovator, team up with big-mountain skier Victor Broquedis, powder champion, in Peru as they summit Cerro Blanco, the world-record 3,860-foot dune, and ride unforgettable downhill mountain bike and ski runs. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill, speed, and adrenaline.

programme.title: S3E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you heart-pounding downhill action from the Mountain of Hell in Les Alpes, France. Watch GoPro athlete Antoni Villoni, downhill master, as he navigates crashes, weaves through expert trails, and powers down 7,800 vertical feet of snow-capped peaks, dusty singletracks, and technical terrain. Hundreds of riders take on this epic race, where only speed, skill, and courage decide who reaches the finish line first. The rules are simple: first one to cross the line wins...

programme.desc: In Los Angeles, a story about a dead girl, told in five chapters. A woman, miserable in her circumscribed life caring for her domineering mother, finds a body. Somehow, this discovery allows her to change. At the morgue, the sister of a girl missing for 15 years believes the body is that of her sister; this liberates her. An older woman, married to a man who pays her little attention, finds evidence in a storage unit; how will she handle it? The mother of the dead girl, who left home some years before, visits the last place her daughter lived and makes her own discoveries. Last, we flash back to the victim's final day.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The first episode of The Big Reveal kicks off with a bang or rather, a jolt, as Compliant Technologies premieres their newest gadget for pioneering the safety of police officers and civilians alike. Next, Kevin Harrington meets with two individuals that Unlock Math for children around the world. Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Our realtors were already superstars, but now it’s time to move them even higher. In this episode, you’ll learn what it takes to win at the highest levels from the 30-billion-dollar-man Jay Abraham, SEO wizard AJ Aluthwala, leadership powerhouse Nate Bailey, and mindset genius Michael Bernoff. They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (and anyone watching) into the stratosphere. So, grab your notepad and pay attention so you don't miss any golden nuggets from this episode of Beyond The Close!

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Step into the heart of innovation with The Big Reveal! Join Sheriff Mark Lamb and MMA legend Ken Shamrock as they explore groundbreaking American companies revolutionizing their industries. From elite camo designed through deer vision science to lightweight titanium firearm suppressors and EMF-neutralizing tech for peak performance—each story uncovers passion, ingenuity, and grit. Discover what’s shaping America’s entrepreneurial spirit. It’s not just business. It’s The Big Reveal.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann) and UFC Hall of Famer Ken Shamrock (Surviving Mann) uncover a breakthrough changing how we live in a world full of invisible forces. Join them as Aires Tech reveals the science behind a revolutionary technology built to protect the human body from electromagnetic stress—empowering performance in a wired world.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.title: Journey Through Patagonia

programme.title: S3E4 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go further behind the scenes as the crew captures Tokyo’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture reigns supreme. They search for the elusive Shinichi Moroboshi, a legendary figure in Japan’s supercar scene and well-known Lamborghini enthusiast. The adventure continues in the snow with GoPro athletes John Jackson and Chris Benchetler on a quest for the perfect ride. From the bustling streets of Tokyo to the serene landscapes of Hakuba and the untouched powder fields of Hokkaido, the crew follows every moment of their journey. Along the way, you will see how these breathtaking stories were crafted, from scouting locations to capturing the raw energy and beauty of each scene. This is your all-access pass to the artistry, adrenaline, and dedication that make these adventures unforgettable.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S2E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you to the world’s most extreme mountain biking adventures. Watch Geoff Gulevich, trail master, tackle some of the gnarliest chutes in Williams Lake, BC, dropping in with local legend Cory Brunelle, downhill expert. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.

programme.title: S3E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic, boundary-pushing adventures. Watch GoPro athlete Kilian Bron, trail innovator, team up with big-mountain skier Victor Broquedis, powder champion, in Peru as they summit Cerro Blanco, the world-record 3,860-foot dune, and ride unforgettable downhill mountain bike and ski runs. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill, speed, and adrenaline.

programme.title: S3E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you heart-pounding downhill action from the Mountain of Hell in Les Alpes, France. Watch GoPro athlete Antoni Villoni, downhill master, as he navigates crashes, weaves through expert trails, and powers down 7,800 vertical feet of snow-capped peaks, dusty singletracks, and technical terrain. Hundreds of riders take on this epic race, where only speed, skill, and courage decide who reaches the finish line first. The rules are simple: first one to cross the line wins...

programme.title: REPLAY | All the Action from the Bonsoy Gold Coast Pro presented by GWM 2025
programme.desc: The Championship Tour is Burleigh Bound. The Bonsoy Gold Coast Pro presented by GWM will go down at Burleigh Heads, a location with its own incredible legacy and rich in surfing heritage. This is the second to last stop of the Tour before the Mid-season Cut; every turn, every heat, every wave matters. Relive Final's Day action as the world's best fight to stay on tour and earn critical points in the World Title race.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Surf Abu Dhabi Pro 2025
programme.desc: The WSL Championship Tour makes its groundbreaking debut in the Middle East at the 2025 Surf Abu Dhabi Pro. The second stop on the CT marks professional surfing's continued global expansion and also establishes Abu Dhabi as an official surf destination. Engineered for excellence, this high-performance wave will provide a canvas for the world's best surfers set against a stunning backdrop of the Arabian Gulf. The event will showcase not only the remarkable evolution of professional surfing beyond its traditional roots, but also the infinite possibility for progression from athletes like rookie Erin Brooks, former World Champion Italo Ferreira, and reigning World Champ Caity Simmers.

programme.title: REPLAY | All the Action from the Western Australia Margaret River Pro 2025
programme.desc: The Western Australia Margaret River Pro is the 7th stop on the 2025 World Surf League Championship Tour. Replay Final's Day at this crucial event, marking the mid-season cut, where the world's best surfers put it all on the line to advance through to the next section of the tour. Margaret River brings raw power, pumping waves and unforgettable drama.

programme.title: Can Julian Wilson Keep His Winning Momentum Going in Portugal? | All In Ep5
programme.desc: While Julian Wilson and Jordy Smith head to Portugal for the MEO Rip Curl Pro Peniche, Carissa Moore and Lakey Peterson travel home to relax for a month before having to compete in the final event on the women's WSL World Tour season, the Beachwaver Maui Pro. After his win in France, Julian needs a good result in Portugal to have a chance at the men's world title. For Jordy, Portugal is a chance to let loose and charge. For every surfer, this is the most critical point in the world tour season, as the Hawaiian leg looms on the horizon.

programme.title: Home Alone?
programme.desc: After a work party went late, Ramona Krotine decided it was time to call it a night. But she never made it home-or did she? programme.title: Home Alone?
programme.desc: After a work party went late, Ramona Krotine decided it was time to call it a night. But she never made it home-or did she? When her body is found the next day in the trunk of her own car, police have to reconstruct what happened in the intervening hours, and who she ran into along the way.

programme.title: Medical Mystery
programme.desc: Rosemarie Essa appeared to have died in a car crash. But when police learn this was no more than a low speed fender-bender, they begin to suspect foul play-by someone who knew what they were doing.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: Ashley Biggs thought it was just another pizza delivery. She didn't know who was waiting on the other end. When she didn't come back, police found the delivery address abandoned, and a pool of blood on the ground. What happened to Ashley Biggs, and who ordered that last pizza?

programme.desc: After a work party went late, Ramona Krotine decided it was time to call it a night. But she never made it home-or did she? programme.title: Home Alone?
programme.desc: After a work party went late, Ramona Krotine decided it was time to call it a night. But she never made it home-or did she? When her body is found the next day in the trunk of her own car, police have to reconstruct what happened in the intervening hours, and who she ran into along the way.

programme.title: Medical Mystery
programme.desc: Rosemarie Essa appeared to have died in a car crash. But when police learn this was no more than a low speed fender-bender, they begin to suspect foul play-by someone who knew what they were doing.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: Ashley Biggs thought it was just another pizza delivery. She didn't know who was waiting on the other end. When she didn't come back, police found the delivery address abandoned, and a pool of blood on the ground. What happened to Ashley Biggs, and who ordered that last pizza?
